leadText: Aqua Cutter (Japanese: アクアカッター Aqua Cutter) is a damage-dealing Water-type move introduced in Generation IX.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] Aqua Cutter inflicts damage and has an increased critical hit ratio. If used by a Pokémon with Sharpness , its power is increased by 50%.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description S V The user expels pressurized water to cut at the target like a blade. This move has a heightened chance of landing a critical hit.

sections.title: Trivia
sections.text: Trivia [ edit | edit source ] Aqua Cutter is the only physical Water-type move that does not make contact , outside of Z-Moves and Max Moves .
